REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF CHRISTOPHER WEINBERGER, ESQ. IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGED IN PARAGRAPHS 61, 65, 74, 98, 100, 115, AND NUMBER 9 ON PAGE 20 OF THE COMPLAINT. THE MOTION IS GRANTED WITH 10-DAY LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE TREBLE DAMAGES CLAIMS ALLEGED IN PARAGRAPH 117 AND NUMBER 6 ON PAGE 20 OF THE COMPLAINT. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Christopher Weinberger, Esq.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Robert Lynch; 510-832-6436; Law Offices of Michael C. Cohen; counsel appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
Christopher Weinberger; 949-221-1000; Bremer, Whyte Brown & O'Meara LLP; counsel appearing via Zoom for defendant.

Defendant contests the courts tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY, AKA THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, NICK NIXON, MCCORMACK & BARRQN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Christopher Weinberger, Esq. is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the punitive damages alleged in paragraphs 61, 65, 74, 98, 100, 115, and Number 9 on Page 20 of the complaint. The motion is GRANTED with 10-day leave to amend as to the treble damages claims alleged in paragraph 117 and Number 6 on Page 20 of the complaint.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
